# Test source

```ts
  1  | // Small utility to send GraphQL and parse JSON (no throws).
  2  | // Returns both raw Response and parsed body.
  3  | export const DEFAULT_GRAPHQL_PATH = process.env.GRAPHQL_PATH || '/api/v1/pharmaserv/graphql';
  4  | 
  5  | export async function graphql(
  6  |   api,
  7  |   {
  8  |     query,
  9  |     operationName,
  10 |     variables,
  11 |     path = DEFAULT_GRAPHQL_PATH,
  12 |     headers, // optional HTTP headers (e.g., Authorization)
  13 |   }
  14 | ) {
> 15 |   const res = await api.post(path, {
     |                         ^ Error: apiRequestContext.post: aborted
  16 |     data: { query, operationName, variables },
  17 |     headers, // NEW: forwarded to the request
  18 |   });
  19 |   let body = null;
  20 |   try {
  21 |     body = await res.json();
  22 |   } catch {
  23 |     /* leave null if non-JSON */
  24 |   }
  25 |   return { res, body };
  26 | }
  27 |
```
